message:
chore(deps): add fsqlite-mvcc and fsqlite-observability path dependencies

Add two new frankensqlite crate dependencies:
- fsqlite-mvcc: multi-version concurrency control for concurrent readers
- fsqlite-observability: query tracing and storage metrics

These are required by the expanded SQLite storage layer for transaction
isolation and performance monitoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
